やれやれ……ようやく帰ってこれた。<br>けど、今日の探索は結構な収穫があったな:
Man... I finally made it back. But today's expedition was pretty
productive.
今日はもう他の仕事はないし、<br>少し早いが明日に備えてゆっくり休むとす――:
I've got no more work today. It's a bit early, but I'll take it slow and
rest up for tomorrow—
背伸びをした瞬間、ドッゴォォォン――！ という<br>盛大な破砕音と共に、司令室:
The moment I stretched, a thunderous BOOOOM! erupted, and the
command room door was blown clean off its hinges.
あ。先生。<br>やっぱりかえってきてた。: Oh. Teacher. You really did come back.
とびら、ごめんなさい。<br>先生にあえるかもって思って、ウキウキして。:
Xiaolei is sorry about the door. Xiaolei was so excited thinking she'd
see Teacher.
力の制御を失敗した、か……: So you lost control of your power...?
ああ、いい、いい。そんな落ち込んだ顔をするな。<br>扉は修理すれば直るんだ。…:
Ah, it's okay, it's okay. Don't make that sad face. The door can be
repaired. ...Though the repair bill won't be cheap.
弁償？ って言っても、おまえ金はあるのか？<br>故郷に仕送りしてるんだろ？:
Compensation? But do you even have money? You're sending money to
your hometown, right?
うん。あんまりお金、ない。<br>だから、あそこではたらく。しょー……かん？:
Mm-hmm. Xiaolei doesn't have much money. So Xiaolei will work there.
Sum...mon?
ルディアに聞いた。お金もらえるって。<br>それに、先生の役にもたてるって。シャ:
Xiaolei heard from Ludia. Xiaolei can get money. And Xiaolei can help
Teacher. Xiaolei wants to work at summoning.
……そうか。<br>おまえがそこまで言ってくれるなら、止めるのも野暮だな。:
...I see. If you feel that strongly about it, I suppose it'd be wrong of
me to stop you.
でも、何をしたらいいのか分からない。<br>先生……おしえて？: But Xiaolei doesn't know what to do. Teacher... will you teach Xiaolei?
ああ……わかった。安心しろ。<br>俺がぜんぶ教えてやる。: Yeah... got it. Don't worry. I'll teach you everything.
